mandate.headline: Jaamal is out — Richard is stepping up as accountable UGCMA command lead.
mandate.objective: Maximize trust by making the business feel controlled: numbers, blockers, decisions, content, team follow-through, and owner updates in one place.
mandate.updatedAt: May 28, 8:35 AM ET manual GetInsights refresh

decisionQueue.title: Owner step-up operating posture
decisionQueue.decision: Richard operates as accountable paid-media/ops lead; Hermes absorbs command-board/reporting/admin follow-through.
decisionQueue.source: UGCMA / OWNER STEP-UP MANDATE: Jaamal quit and the owner directly asked Richard to step up. Assistant operating posture is now higher-ownership: maintain BU-separated paid-media command view…

decisionQueue.title: What numbers are safe to quote upward?
decisionQueue.decision: Use BU-separated directionality; do not hard-quote cash/ROAS where analytics-close, deals, CRM, or cash disagree.
decisionQueue.source: UGCMA / 08:35 May 28 GetInsights refresh + dashboard-feed repair: Fresh MCP pull shows BU1/Sydney today $2.055k spend / 389 ad leads / $5.28 CPL / 31 booked / 9.7% show / analytics 0 closes…
